parsed.production_notes: Natural lighting, slight handheld camera shake, and genuine facial expressions indicate human recording. No AI artifacts are present.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s, medium build, light complexion, dark hair with bangs. Cheerful and relaxed.
characters.wardrobe: Red short-sleeved t-shirt, white smartwatch, small hoop earrings.

characters.appearance: 50s, medium build, light complexion, blonde hair pulled back, wearing glasses. Warm and encouraging.

scenes.setting: Bedroom with a world map poster, and a kitchen. Daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: A younger woman lies on her stomach on a bed, holding a black smartphone in her right hand. She smiles while looking at the screen. The bed has a white frame and a patterned sheet with roads and cars. A colorful world map poster hangs on the white wall behind her. Bright, natural lighting fills the room.
An older woman is framed from the chest up in a kitchen setting with light cabinets. She wears glasses and gestures slightly with her hands while looking forward. The lighting is soft and even.

scenes.visual_description: A composite video call scene. The main background shows Character A on a bed holding a phone. A small rectangular inset at the top center shows Character B in a kitchen. Both appear engaged in a continuous conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Thank you for speaking Spanish with me.
Character B says: De nada. [You're welcome.]
Character A says: I'm trying to practice speaking... bueno, estoy practicando para hablar con los niños más. [well, I'm practicing to speak with the kids more.]
Character B says: Y conmigo también. [And with me too.]
Character A says: Y contigo. [And with you.]
Character B says: Entiendo mejor tu español. [I understand your Spanish better now.]
Character A says: Estoy practicando con ellos, like yo y con ellos en una aplicación que se llama Speak. [I'm practicing with them, like me and with them on an app called Speak.]
Character B says: Oh, sí? [Oh, yeah?]
Character A says: Mhm.
Character B says: Y cómo trabaja eso? [And how does that work?]
Character A says: Solamente le hablamos a la aplicación y nos conversa. [You just speak to the app and it speaks to you.]
Character A says: So we just talk... we just talk to it.
Character A says: Yeah, we talk to it and then it talks to us again and then that's how we practice.
